preferred_translation: with taking personally as condition, becoming
definition: Forward-link line connecting upādāna and bhava.
notes: Use this record for the whole line. It keeps the appropriative force of upādāna tied to the processive force of bhava at a key doctrinal transition. The Buddhadasa usage profile supports keeping the line processive and practically readable rather than static and metaphysical.

context_rules.rendering: with taking personally as condition, becoming

context_rules.context: When a controlled alternate for upādāna is already in use
context_rules.notes: Use only when the surrounding frame explicitly requires that alternate.

example_phrases.translation: with taking personally as condition, becoming

authority_basis.scope: Supports keeping the line processive and practically readable rather than static and metaphysical.

translation_policy.default_scope: Use as the standard line linking upādāna and bhava in the forward chain.
translation_policy.when_not_to_apply: Do not flatten bhava into a static state of existence in this formula slot without a documented reason.
translation_policy.drift_risk: Prevents drift from appropriation into abstract existence language.
